_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of Payment Card Industry (PCI) data security standards.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of sector-specific data regulations and their interaction with general data protection law, including HIPAA (healthcare), GLBA and SOX (financial services), FERPA (education), and PCI DSS (payment card industry).
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-002 (RC, cosine: 0.534), SP-K-002 (SP, cosine: 0.527).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.608). Shared vocabulary: [card, data, industry, knowledge, payment, pci]. DCWF-only terms [security, standards] vs WIDAI-only terms [dss, education, ferpa, financial, general, glba] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.901, R=0.826). P exceeds R by 0.075 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of Payment Card Industry (PCI) data security standards." and "Knowledge of sector-specific data regulations and their interaction with general" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.645 ≈ STS 0.608 (gap 0.037). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [card, data, industry, knowledge, payment] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 24.1%. Shared tokens: [card, data, industry, knowledge, payment, pci]. DCWF-only: [security, standards]. WIDAI-only: [dss, education, ferpa, financial, general, glba].
